MeasurementToolMetadata.Description: The Penn Computerized Neurobehavioral Battery (CNB) is an online cognitive assessment consisting of a series of tasks that measure accuracy and speed of performance in major cognitive domains.

session_id.Description: BIDS session label assigned chronologically via Flywheel created timestamp

cnb_pcet_rtcr.LongName: PCET Median Response Time for Correct Responses

cnb_pcet_rter.LongName: PCET Median Response Time for Incorrect Responses

cnb_pcet_rt.LongName: PCET Median Response Time for All Responses

cnb_pcet_cat.LongName: PCET Total Number of Categories Achieved

cnb_pcet_cat1_tr.LongName: PCET Total Number of Responses for Category 1

cnb_pcet_cat2_tr.LongName: PCET Total Number of Responses for Category 2

cnb_pcet_cat3_tr.LongName: PCET Total Number of Responses for Category 3

cnb_pcet_cnt_750.LongName: PCET Total Count of Responses Under 750 milliseconds

cnb_pcet_lrsr.LongName: PCET Longest Run of Same Responses

cnb_pcet_valid_code.LongName: Validation Code for entire Penn Conditional Exclusion Task

Levels.F: Likely valid, problem occurred which affected performance for a limited number of responses/mild to moderate effect
